ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* A brief description about the user */,
  "posts_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts made by the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "loot" INTEGER /* Loot points accumulated by the user */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the user was active on the platform */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image attached to the post */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video attached to the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total likes received by the post */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been viewed */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is pinned by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is pinned by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the like was made */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the like has been removed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, like) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., follow, like, comment, message) */,
  "related_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related post (if applicable) */,
  "related_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related comment (if applicable) */,
  "related_message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related message (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_related_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_related_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_related_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the message has been read */,
  "replied_to_message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being replied to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_replied_to_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("replied_to_message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "affected_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected by the admin action (if applicable) */,
  "affected_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post affected by the admin action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_affected_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_affected_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_following_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the post */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the share occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the post */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the view occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reply was created */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
